---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "bug: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

```bash
# Command or code that triggers the issue
powexif show photo.jpg
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message or unexpected output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15, Windows 11]
- Rust version: [output of `rustc --version`]
- powexif version: [output of `powexif --version`]

## Additional context

If possible, attach a minimal sample image (a few-KB JPEG/TIFF) that reproduces the problem.
